title: Adjacent p-first symplectic Euler orbit states preserve the invariant

source.notes: This theorem lifts the one-step invariant to adjacent states of an indexed p-first symplectic Euler orbit.

informal.statement: If real-valued sequences q and p satisfy the p-first symplectic Euler recurrence, then for every index n, the modified quadratic invariant at (q_{n+1}, p_{n+1}) equals its value at (q_n, p_n).
informal.latex: Let \(q,p:\mathbb{N}\to\mathbb{R}\) satisfy \(p_{n+1}=p_n-\Delta t\,\omega^2q_n\) and \(q_{n+1}=q_n+\Delta t\,p_{n+1}\). Then \(H(q_{n+1},p_{n+1})=H(q_n,p_n)\), where \(H(q,p)=p^2+\omega^2q^2-\Delta t\,\omega^2qp\).
assumptions: omega and dt are real numbers
q and p are real-valued sequences indexed by natural numbers
q and p satisfy the p-first symplectic Euler recurrence
informal.expected_conclusion: The modified quadratic invariant is preserved from one indexed orbit state to the next.

declarations.name: symplecticEulerInvariant
declarations.statement: def symplecticEulerInvariant (omega dt q p : ℝ) : ℝ := p ^ 2 + omega ^ 2 * q ^ 2 - dt * omega ^ 2 * q * p

declarations.name: IsSymplecticEulerOrbit
declarations.statement: def IsSymplecticEulerOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (q p : ℕ → ℝ) : Prop := ∀ n : ℕ, p (n + 1) = symplecticEulerPNext omega dt (q n) (p n) ∧ q (n + 1) = symplecticEulerQNext omega dt (q n) (p n)

declarations.name: symplecticEulerInvariant_step_of_isSymplecticEulerOrbit
declarations.statement: theorem symplecticEulerInvariant_step_of_isSymplecticEulerOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (q p : ℕ → ℝ) (hqp : IsSymplecticEulerOrbit omega dt q p) (n : ℕ) : symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q (n + 1)) (p (n + 1)) = symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q n) (p n)

tasks.input: Translate the adjacent-state informal invariant statement into a Lean 4 theorem statement using IsSymplecticEulerOrbit.
tasks.target: theorem symplecticEulerInvariant_step_of_isSymplecticEulerOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (q p : ℕ → ℝ) (hqp : IsSymplecticEulerOrbit omega dt q p) (n : ℕ) : symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q (n + 1)) (p (n + 1)) = symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q n) (p n)

tasks.input: Given the one-step theorem and the orbit recurrence assumption, complete the proof.
tasks.target: A proof destructing the recurrence pair, rewriting, and applying symplecticEulerInvariant_preserved.
